title: 有馬記念の後に・世紀末覇王、爆誕！

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
With my flawless victory, I have ended the
Golden Generation. Now begins the era of the
Centurial Overlord dynasty! The ruler of which
is... me, of course!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Captain of Knights, Doto! Castle Neighbor,
Ayabe! And the one destined to be my twin
sun—Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text: The crowd is exuberant over the dawning of this new, grand age! Thus concludes Origins of the Centurial Overlord... But my legend yet continues.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Yes! The story of the Centurial Overlord has only
just begun!
